## 测试 / Tests

- [ ] 已为非 UI 行为新增或更新详尽单元测试。
- [ ] Unit tests were added or updated for non-UI behavior.
- [ ] 已为 Flutter UI、展示状态、导航、弹窗、sheet、按钮、手势、空态、错误态或用户交互新增或更新 widget test。
- [ ] Widget tests were added or updated for Flutter UI, rendering states, navigation, dialogs, sheets, buttons, gestures, empty/error states, or user interactions.
- [ ] 所有前端用户可见字符串都已做多语言适配。
- [ ] All user-facing frontend strings are localized.
- [ ] 已说明所有跳过的检查及剩余风险。
- [ ] Skipped checks and residual risks are explained.
